description: Wind Power LLC's main warehouse is getting crowded. The Warehouse Manager has designated specific racks for components. You must configure Putaway Rules to automate the routing of a new shipment from 'Eagle Hardware'. First, create three Putaway Rules: 1) Item: 'Rotor Blade', Warehouse: 'Blade Rack 1 - WP', Capacity: 40, Priority: 1. 2) Item: 'Rotor Blade', Warehouse: 'Blade Rack 2 - WP', Capacity: 40, Priority: 2. 3) Item: 'Gearbox', Warehouse: 'Heavy Parts - WP', Capacity: 50, Priority: 1. Next, open the pending Purchase Order from Eagle Hardware (containing 60 Rotor Blades and 25 Gearboxes). Create a Purchase Receipt from it, check the 'Apply Putaway Rule' checkbox so the system automatically splits the Rotor Blades across the two racks based on capacity, and then Save and Submit the Purchase Receipt. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
